reforms.description: The Irish government has launched an ambitious initiative to boost residential accommodation, which includes measures to support the digitalisation of SMEs and a pledge of €8 billion to achieve 500,000 home energy upgrades by 2030, aiming to enhance housing supply and reduce emissions in the residential sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The initiative aims to improve housing supply and energy efficiency, which can enhance productivity and living standards.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has publicly pledged the funding and outlined the goals for the initiative.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant policy change with substantial funding and a clear goal for residential upgrades.
reforms.source_quote: The recovery plan includes measures to support the digitalisation of SMEs, such as the establishment of Irish European digital innovation hubs.

reforms.description: The Department of Finance established the Fintech Steering Group as part of the International Financial Services Strategy Ireland for Finance, focusing on promoting FinTech and digital finance.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Promoting FinTech and digital finance is expected to enhance innovation and competitiveness in the financial sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The steering group has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the steering group represents a significant step in promoting a key sector but is not a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The Department of Finance established the Fintech Steering Group, and FinTech and digital finance is a priority theme in the 2022 Update to the Ireland for Finance Strategy.

reforms.description: The Housing for All Strategy aims to improve innovation and productivity in the residential construction sector by establishing a modern methods of construction leadership group and promoting initiatives to enhance the use of innovative construction techniques.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing construction techniques, the strategy is expected to improve efficiency and productivity in the housing sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been publicly announced and is in the planning stages.
reforms.importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant policy change aimed at transforming the construction sector.
reforms.source_quote: The Housing for All Strategy aims to improve innovation and productivity of the residential construction sector.

reforms.description: The Future Building Initiative was launched to facilitate the matching of employers’ vacancies to jobseekers seeking employment in the construction sector, addressing the skills gap and improving employment outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By addressing the skills gap, the initiative aims to improve employment outcomes and enhance the workforce in the construction sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been launched and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to improve employment outcomes but is not a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: In 2022, the Future Building Initiative was launched to facilitate the matching of employers’ vacancies to jobseekers seeking employment.

reforms.description: The Sláintecare Implementation Strategy was launched to improve the Irish healthcare system by establishing a universal, single-tier health system focused on care needs rather than ability to pay, including the establishment of a National Health Fund to support multi-year financial stability and integration of services.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to enhance healthcare delivery and accessibility, which can improve public health outcomes and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been launched and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant overhaul of the healthcare system in Ireland.
reforms.source_quote: The Government launched its Sláintecare Implementation Strategy in 2018.
